name: ListCompatibleImagesRequest
description: ListCompatibleImagesRequest schema from Amazon Snow Family API

allOf.description: The maximum number of results for the list of compatible images. Currently, a Snowball Edge device can store 10 AMIs.
HTTP requests are stateless. To identify what object comes "next" in the list of compatible images, you can specify a value for NextToken as the starting point for your list of returned images.
